registered.name: AI Ethics: Right and Wrong
registered.desc: This course exists because the people building AI are not the only ones who should be deciding what it does.

registered.name: Keeping AI Under Control
registered.desc: AI is already making decisions about your life. This course teaches you to see how — and why that matters more than most adults realize.

registered.name: AI in Class: Use It or Lose It
registered.desc: This course is about the one that arrived while you were already sitting in class.

registered.name: Is the Robot Being Fair?
registered.desc: AI is already making decisions about people — and some of those decisions are wrong in ways that follow a pattern.

registered.name: Pick the Right AI for the Job
registered.desc: Why choosing the wrong AI is as important as choosing the right one
